_comment: Copy this to .claude/settings.json in your research project to enable framework hooks. Skills installed under .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md are auto-discovered by Claude Code. Stop nudges when analysis evidence appears without an insights doc; UserPromptSubmit surfaces relevant learnings; PreCompact reminds to refresh the active plan handoff and capture session learnings.

skillOverrides._comment: r2p-adopt is dormant by default — only useful at one-shot project adoption. user-invocable-only hides the description from Claude (zero context cost) but keeps /r2p-adopt available in the slash menu for explicit invocation. After you've completed adoption, leave this as-is; it stays out of Claude's way without further action.
